title: Old-Growth Deferrals Expansion
description: Government announces additional old-growth deferrals - 2M hectares now under deferral

options.label: Redesign the plan around the deferrals
options.outcome: You pull the affected blocks and rebuild the schedule. Slower, but the plan is defensible and the ministry notices.

options.label: Argue block-by-block exemptions
options.outcome: You keep some volume moving, but every exemption request spends goodwill and draws eyes to the file.

title: Glyphosate Phase-Out
description: Provincial government phases out glyphosate use - chemical vegetation control no longer permitted

options.label: Retool to manual brushing crews
options.outcome: You hire brushing crews and rewrite the prescriptions. Expensive, but the program is clean on day one.

options.label: Stretch the remaining chemical stock through the transition
options.outcome: You use up what is legally on hand and hope the timeline holds. Cheaper, but auditors are watching the phase-out closely.

title: Major Wildfire Season
description: Major fires affect timber supply, government fast-tracks salvage permits (25-day timeline)

options.label: Chase the fast-tracked salvage window
options.outcome: You redirect crews into burned stands on the 25-day clock. Volume moves, but the pace grinds people down.

options.label: Hold your planned program
options.outcome: You keep crews on the original schedule and let others chase salvage. Steadier work, but volume stays on the table.

title: Media Spotlight on Forestry
description: Forestry practices are under public scrutiny; how you handle the attention shapes trust in the file.

options.label: Invite reporters out for a site walk
options.outcome: You answer the hard questions standing on the block. It costs a day, and it buys trust.

options.label: Decline interviews and keep crews working
options.outcome: The work gets done, but the silence reads as defensiveness in every story that runs.

title: First Nations Land Rights Victory
description: Court ruling strengthens First Nations land rights - stricter consultation requirements now in effect

options.label: Rebuild the consultation plan to the new standard
options.outcome: You get ahead of the ruling and re-engage every affected Nation. The schedule slips, but the file gains real standing.

options.label: Wait for ministry guidance before changing anything
options.outcome: You keep working to the old standard while the lawyers read the ruling. The delay is noticed by the Nations most affected.

title: Mountain Pine Beetle Outbreak
description: Beetle outbreak detected in harvest areas - 20-60% volume loss, salvage operations required

options.label: Pivot the program to beetle salvage
options.outcome: You re-sequence toward hit stands before the blue stain sets in. Costly and rushed, but the wood is recovered.

options.label: Hold the plan and absorb the loss
options.outcome: You stay the course and write off the hardest-hit blocks. The plan holds, but the lost volume shows in the numbers.

title: Severe Windstorm
description: Windstorm damages standing timber - 10-30% volume loss to windthrow

options.label: Divert crews to windthrow salvage
options.outcome: You get the blowdown on the ground to a mill before it degrades. The planned program slips a beat.

options.label: Leave the blowdown and stay on plan
options.outcome: You keep the schedule, but downed timber left on the block is a bark-beetle brood pile and everyone knows it.

title: Muskeg Subsidence on Haul Route
description: A warm spell is softening peatland crossings along your mainline north of the Peace River, and loaded trucks are starting to break through.

options.label: Corduroy the approaches and reduce axle loads
options.outcome: Crews spend two days laying corduroy mats and instituting lighter loads. Production slows but you keep the haul alive.

options.label: Reroute across higher ridge ground
options.outcome: You pivot to a longer ridge alignment. It avoids damage yet demands extra engineering checks.

options.label: Suspend hauling until freeze-up
options.outcome: Operations pause entirely. Communities appreciate the caution while the mill scrambles for fibre.

title: Caribou Maternal Pen Closure
description: The province issues an emergency access restriction around a caribou maternal pen overlapping your BWBS and SWB tenure.

options.label: Shift development to alternate watersheds
options.outcome: You relocate effort to adjacent drainages. Stakeholders applaud but contractors face idle periods.

options.label: Negotiate limited access windows with guardians
options.outcome: A co-developed schedule allows short hauling windows with Indigenous monitors on site.

options.label: Challenge the order citing economic hardship
options.outcome: An appeal buys you time but strains relationships across the table.

title: Cultural Burning Collaboration
description: Lheidli T'enneh firekeepers request support for a cultural burn on SBS interface blocks to reduce ladder fuels before summer.

options.label: Fund planning and integrate burn objectives
options.outcome: You supply burn plans, crews, and monitoring. The collaboration deepens trust and improves stand resilience.

options.label: Decline citing risk and resource limits
options.outcome: You keep focus on conventional treatments. Partners view the response as dismissive.

options.label: Refer to BC Wildfire Service to lead
options.outcome: BCWS agrees to facilitate under strict conditions. The burn proceeds cautiously with moderate relationship gains.

title: Salmon Crossing Washout
description: An atmospheric river scours a fish-bearing creek along your Skeena access road, leaving gear stranded beyond the washout.

options.label: Install a temporary Bailey bridge with habitat oversight
options.outcome: Engineers and biologists fast-track a modular bridge. It's costly but keeps the salmon channel stable.

options.label: Suspend hauling and reroute to higher ground
options.outcome: You leave equipment in place and develop a ridge detour. Contractors grumble, yet communities commend the patience.

options.label: Helicopter sling high-value loads
options.outcome: Critical gear is flown out to resume production elsewhere, draining contingency funds.

title: Ice Road Window Collapsing
description: Mid-winter rain threatens to close the ice bridge supplying your BWBS camp for the rest of the season.

options.label: Accelerate hauling with double shifts
options.outcome: Crews push through long hours to move inventory before thaw. Wear and tear increases, but quotas are met.

options.label: Stage loads and wait for re-freeze
options.outcome: You secure landings and pause hauling. Expenses climb while you safeguard the corridor.

options.label: Truck via distant all-weather route
options.outcome: A 300 km detour keeps fibre flowing but hammers your budget and schedules.

title: Karst Cave Discovery
description: A reconnaissance crew in the Skeena-Nass plateau uncovers a karst cave with cultural features in the planned cutblock.

options.label: Commission karst and cultural inventories
options.outcome: Specialists map subterranean passages alongside Indigenous knowledge keepers, leading to a major redesign.

options.label: Flag a reserve and proceed with buffers
options.outcome: You set aside the cave feature with generous buffers. Regulators caution that monitoring must continue.

options.label: Harvest around the feature with minimal change
options.outcome: Operations continue with narrow setbacks. Guardians question the protection level.

title: Community Water Turbidity Warning
description: Smithers issues a turbidity advisory downstream of your interface road maintenance work.

options.label: Install sediment socks and continuous monitoring
options.outcome: You bring in hydrotech crews, install treatment, and share live data with the community.

options.label: Pause work and co-author a mitigation plan
options.outcome: Joint field walks develop long-term prescriptions. Schedule impacts mount, but trust rebounds strongly.

options.label: Dispute the readings and continue
options.outcome: You question data quality and push ahead. Officials warn that enforcement is imminent.

title: Glacial Outburst Watch
description: Hydrometric crews detect rising risk of a jökulhlaup on the Stikine headwaters below your SWB operations.

options.label: Evacuate valley crews and redesign drainage
options.outcome: You pull teams back and invest in terrain stability modelling before re-entry.

options.label: Install remote sensors and keep skeleton crews
options.outcome: Monitoring arrays provide lead time while limited operations continue cautiously.

options.label: Accept the low probability and stay the course
options.outcome: Productivity remains high, yet emergency planners flag your risk tolerance.

title: Key Contractor Bankruptcy
description: A long-time road builder files for bankruptcy, leaving projects mid-stream.

options.label: Absorb crews into company operations
options.outcome: You hire the core crew directly, stabilizing delivery but expanding payroll.

options.label: Rebid projects to other contractors
options.outcome: New bidders take time to mobilize, delaying schedules but protecting capital.

options.label: Pause worksites and renegotiate scope
options.outcome: You shrink the program, frustrating mills yet avoiding risk.

title: Labour Job Action Threatened
description: Union stewards demand revised safety provisions or threaten a strategic slowdown before fall surge.

options.label: Co-develop a refreshed safety charter
options.outcome: You spend two weeks negotiating safeguards and joint inspections, averting the slowdown.

options.label: Offer bonuses to keep the season moving
options.outcome: You buy short-term peace yet signal safety takes a backseat to quotas.

options.label: Call the bluff and prepare replacement crews
options.outcome: Replacement hires arrive but community sentiment cools dramatically.

title: Lumber Market Crash
description: North American lumber prices tank overnight, forcing difficult decisions about volume commitments.

options.label: Throttle harvest and preserve cash
options.outcome: You slow felling plans and protect balance sheets. Contractors brace for lean months.

options.label: Run full tilt to chase mill utilization
options.outcome: You keep production high to maintain market share, burning through reserves.

options.label: Pivot to value-added community contracts
options.outcome: You retool output toward specialty orders with local partners, stabilizing some revenue.

title: Mountain Pine Beetle Scouts Detected
description: Beetles are surfacing on the fringe of your SBS salvage recovery units. Entomologists warn an outbreak could reignite.

options.label: Launch sanitation crews immediately
options.outcome: You fall trap-trees and chip hotspots, buying valuable time against the beetles.

options.label: Monitor with pheromone traps for a season
options.outcome: You collect data before committing funds. Scientists caution that action will be needed soon.

options.label: Hold budgets for now and hope cold snaps arrive
options.outcome: You bank on weather doing the work. Neighbours question the hands-off approach.

title: Beetle Flights Intensify
description: Trap data shows beetle flights tripled. Adjacent licensees report mortality creeping toward their stands.

options.label: Fund aerial surveys and joint response now
options.outcome: You coordinate aerial sweep maps, sharing intel region-wide to contain spread.

options.label: Prioritize salvage volume while it lasts
options.outcome: You swing crews into salvage blitzes, drawing criticism for short-term thinking.

title: Regional Beetle Spillover
description: Adjacent operations suffer outbreaks traced to your tenure, straining cross-license relationships.

options.label: Lead a regional emergency summit
options.outcome: You convene peers, Nations, and government to rebuild trust and align salvage plans.

options.label: Offer stumpage credits to impacted neighbours
options.outcome: Credits soften the blow but dent your financial outlook.

options.label: Downplay the link and stay focused internally
options.outcome: You dispute the attribution. Collaboration fractures and oversight increases.

title: Falling Tree Fatality
description: A 28-year-old faller was struck and killed by a widow-maker during harvest operations

options.label: Full cooperation with investigation, implement all safety recommendations
options.outcome: Hire external safety consultants, implement gold-standard protocols

options.label: Standard compliance response, meet minimum legal requirements
options.outcome: Basic legal compliance, internal safety review

options.label: Minimize response, challenge WorkSafeBC findings in court
options.outcome: Aggressive legal defense, minimal safety improvements. The lawyers are cheaper than the fix, but the regulator remembers.

options.label: Attempt to bribe WorkSafeBC inspectors
options.outcome: ILLEGAL: Attempt to corrupt government officials. Word travels fast, and the file lands on a prosecutor's desk.

title: Equipment Rollover Fatality
description: Heavy equipment operator crushed when loader rolled over on steep terrain

options.label: Full cooperation with investigation, implement all safety recommendations
options.outcome: Hire external safety consultants, implement gold-standard protocols

options.label: Standard compliance response, meet minimum legal requirements
options.outcome: Basic legal compliance, internal safety review

options.label: Minimize response, challenge WorkSafeBC findings in court
options.outcome: Aggressive legal defense, minimal safety improvements. The lawyers are cheaper than the fix, but the regulator remembers.

options.label: Attempt to bribe WorkSafeBC inspectors
options.outcome: ILLEGAL: Attempt to corrupt government officials. Word travels fast, and the file lands on a prosecutor's desk.

title: Transportation Fatality
description: Logging truck driver killed in highway collision with loaded trailer

options.label: Full cooperation with investigation, implement all safety recommendations
options.outcome: Hire external safety consultants, implement gold-standard protocols

options.label: Standard compliance response, meet minimum legal requirements
options.outcome: Basic legal compliance, internal safety review

options.label: Minimize response, challenge WorkSafeBC findings in court
options.outcome: Aggressive legal defense, minimal safety improvements. The lawyers are cheaper than the fix, but the regulator remembers.

options.label: Attempt to bribe WorkSafeBC inspectors
options.outcome: ILLEGAL: Attempt to corrupt government officials. Word travels fast, and the file lands on a prosecutor's desk.

title: Chainsaw Accident
description: Worker suffered severe leg lacerations requiring emergency helicopter evacuation

options.label: Full cooperation with investigation, implement all safety recommendations
options.outcome: Hire external safety consultants, implement gold-standard protocols

options.label: Standard compliance response, meet minimum legal requirements
options.outcome: Basic legal compliance, internal safety review

options.label: Minimize response, challenge WorkSafeBC findings in court
options.outcome: Aggressive legal defense, minimal safety improvements. The lawyers are cheaper than the fix, but the regulator remembers.

options.label: Attempt to bribe WorkSafeBC inspectors
options.outcome: ILLEGAL: Attempt to corrupt government officials. Word travels fast, and the file lands on a prosecutor's desk.

title: Helicopter Crash
description: Helicopter carrying 4 workers crashed during crew transport, 2 critical injuries

options.label: Full cooperation with investigation, implement all safety recommendations
options.outcome: Hire external safety consultants, implement gold-standard protocols

options.label: Standard compliance response, meet minimum legal requirements
options.outcome: Basic legal compliance, internal safety review

options.label: Minimize response, challenge WorkSafeBC findings in court
options.outcome: Aggressive legal defense, minimal safety improvements. The lawyers are cheaper than the fix, but the regulator remembers.

options.label: Attempt to bribe WorkSafeBC inspectors
options.outcome: ILLEGAL: Attempt to corrupt government officials. Word travels fast, and the file lands on a prosecutor's desk.

title: Herbicide Exposure Incident
description: 3 workers hospitalized after exposure to herbicide spray drift

options.label: Full cooperation with investigation, implement all safety recommendations
options.outcome: Hire external safety consultants, implement gold-standard protocols

options.label: Standard compliance response, meet minimum legal requirements
options.outcome: Basic legal compliance, internal safety review

options.label: Minimize response, challenge WorkSafeBC findings in court
options.outcome: Aggressive legal defense, minimal safety improvements. The lawyers are cheaper than the fix, but the regulator remembers.

options.label: Attempt to bribe WorkSafeBC inspectors
options.outcome: ILLEGAL: Attempt to corrupt government officials. Word travels fast, and the file lands on a prosecutor's desk.
